allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add Vite/React build configuration

Set up Vite as the new build system replacing Next.js:
- Add vite.config.ts with React plugin configuration
- Add index.html as Vite entry point
- Add PostCSS and Tailwind CSS configuration
- Update TypeScript configs (tsconfig.json, tsconfig.app.json, tsconfig.node.json)
- Add Vite environment type definitions
- Update package.json dependencies (Vite, React, Tailwind CSS, etc.)
- Add .env.example for environment variable template
EOF
)")
